AMENDMENT NO. 1 TO MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

between MegaCloud Inc. ("Vendor") and Customer Corp. ("Customer")
Effective Date: January 1, 2024

This Amendment No. 1 (the "Amendment") amends the Master Services
Agreement effective January 1, 2022 (the "Agreement") between Vendor and
Customer. Capitalized terms not defined herein have the meaning given in
the Agreement.

1. BACKGROUND
1.1 In recognition of Customer's continued partnership, Vendor agrees to
extend a loyalty discount as set forth below.

2. LOYALTY DISCOUNT
2.1 Customer shall receive a loyalty discount of ten percent (10%) off the
recurring subscription fees, effective January 1, 2024 through December
31, 2024.

3. NO OTHER CHANGES
3.1 Except as expressly modified by this Amendment, all other terms of the
Agreement remain in full force and effect.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Amendment as of the
Effective Date above.
